commands.author: SebTardif
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=de18b8e3321440e31d6c776563e6091820499a3d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `model_failover` and `model_failure_terminal` Plugin SDK hooks, wires runtime emission in embedded failover and gateway terminal-failure paths, updates docs/baselines, and adds focused hook/fallback tests.

PR surface: Source +236, Tests +568, Docs +19, Generated 0. Total +823 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: `createFollowupRunner` calls `runWithModelFallback` and then `runEmbeddedAgent` without opting into or passing `nextCandidate`, while the new logger needs that value to report the selected fallback target. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can propagate the selected fallback candidate through the queued follow-up runner; the remaining public contract acceptance stays with maintainers.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
